meanings.definition: a person who drinks alcohol to excess habitually
pork trimmings chopped and pickled and jelled
the act of making something completely wet
examples: he gave it a good drenching

meanings.definition: cover with liquid; pour liquid onto
examples: souse water on his hot face

meanings.definition: immerse briefly into a liquid so as to wet, coat, or saturate
examples: dip the garment into the cleaning solution
dip the brush into the paint
